SmolLM3 follows Qwen2.5 in using YARN to extrapolate the context length from 64k training context to 128k inference context.

edges.subject: HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct
edges.description: SFT stage of SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct uses HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk as the SFT dataset.
description_variants: SFT stage of SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct uses HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk as the SFT dataset.

Full 1.1M-sample SmolTalk dataset (MagPie-Ultra + Smol-Rewrite/Constraints/Summarization + math + code + system + function-calling + long-context + casual + rewriting + OpenHermes2.5) consumed for 2 epochs of SFT.
SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct's SFT phase uses the full SmolTalk dataset (HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk) via TRL + alignment-handbook recipe.

SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct is fine-tuned on the HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk aggregator (1M synthetic SFT samples) which mixes the in-house Smol-Magpie-Ultra/constraints/rewrite/summarize subsets with curated public SFT corpora.
SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct was SFTed on the SmolTalk instruction dataset using TRL plus the alignment-handbook recipe.

SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct was fine-tuned on the SmolTalk dataset, one of three new datasets the SmolLM2 team built (alongside FineMath and Stack-Edu) because existing instruction-following data was deemed too small or low-quality.

edges.subject: HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM3-3B
edges.description: SmolLM3-3B (chat / dual instruct+reasoning) is initialized from SmolLM3-3B-Base after long-context extension and then post-trained via reasoning mid-training, SFT, APO alignment, and merging.
description_variants: SmolLM3-3B (chat / dual instruct+reasoning) is initialized from SmolLM3-3B-Base after long-context extension and then post-trained via reasoning mid-training, SFT, APO alignment, and merging.

SmolLM3-3B chat/instruct is initialized from the SmolLM3-3B-Base pretrained checkpoint and continues with midtraining on 140B reasoning tokens, supervised fine-tuning, and APO alignment to produce the released instruct model.

SmolLM3-3B (3B-parameter hybrid-reasoning instruct model) is initialized from the SmolLM3-3B-Base pretrain checkpoint and continued through midtraining on 140B reasoning tokens, supervised fine-tuning, and APO alignment.

SmolLM3-3B (the released instruct/reasoning model) inherits weights from the SmolLM3-3B-Base checkpoint via a cascade of long-context mid-training, reasoning mid-training, SFT, APO alignment, and final model merging.

SmolLM3-3B (final Instruct release) is initialized at the mid-training stage from HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM3-3B-Base; the mid-trained checkpoint lives at HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM3-3B-checkpoints (revision it-mid-training).

anchor_list.explanation: Both releases share the same SmolLM3-3B family; the chat release continues training from the Base checkpoint via the documented post-training pipeline.

edges.subject: HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM3-3B
edges.description: The mid-training mixture is also released as part of HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk2 (the 'mid' subset), per author confirmations in the blog comments.
description_variants: The mid-training mixture is also released as part of HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk2 (the 'mid' subset), per author confirmations in the blog comments.
SFT data is part of HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk2 (the 'sft' subset), the release of all SmolLM3 post-training mixtures.
APO preference data is also released as part of HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk2 (the 'preference' subset), per the SmolTalk2 release.
SmolLM3-3B's mid-training phase consumed the `Mid` config of smoltalk2 (4.78M rows, ~35.17B tokens) prior to SFT and preference optimization.

SFT phase of SmolLM3-3B consumed the `SFT` config of smoltalk2 (3.38M examples, ~19.29B tokens), an aggregate of 25 underlying datasets (10 think + 15 no_think) decontaminated against eval benchmarks.
Preference (APO) phase of SmolLM3-3B consumed the `Preference` config of smoltalk2 (446886 rows total).
Mid-training trains on the smoltalk2 'Mid' config — the Llama_Nemotron_Post_Training_Dataset_reasoning_r1 split and the OpenThoughts3_1.2M split, each at weight 1.0 — packing on, max_length 32768.

SmolLM3-3B SFT trains on the smoltalk2 'SFT' config across 25 named splits (everyday_convs_no_think, systemchats_30k_no_think, tulu_3_sft_personas_instruction_following_no_think, hermes_function_calling_v1_no_think, smol_magpie_ultra_no_think, multilingual_8languages_lang_5_no_think, table_gpt_no_think, OpenHermes_2.5_no_think, OpenThoughts3_1.2M_no_think_no_think, Mixture_of_Thoughts_science_no_think, explore_instruct_rewriting_no_think, smol_rewrite_no_think, smol_summarize_no_think, LongAlign_64k_context_lang_annotated_lang_6_no_think, multi_turn_reasoning_if_think, everyday_convs_reasoning_Qwen3_32B_think, systemchats_Qwen3_32B_think, xlam_traces_no_think, smolagents_toolcalling_traces_think, s1k_1.1_think, LongAlign_64k_Qwen3_32B_yarn_131k_think, aya_dataset_Qwen3_32B_think, multilingual8_Qwen3_32B_think, OpenThoughts3_1.2M_think, table_gpt_Qwen3_32B_think). Mixed weights 0.02–1.0; 5 epochs.
Final DPO/APO uses two preference splits of smoltalk2 'Preference' config (llama_3.1_tulu_3_8b_preference_mixture_no_think weight 0.5, tulu_3_8b_pref_mix_Qwen3_32B_Qwen3_0.6B_think weight 0.25).

edges.subject: HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM3-3B
edges.description: Qwen3-32B in reasoning (thinking) mode generated synthetic reasoning traces used in SFT for domains lacking such data (multi-turn conversations, multilinguality, everyday conversations); these synthetic completions form a portion of the 10 reasoning-mode SFT datasets.
description_variants: Qwen3-32B in reasoning (thinking) mode generated synthetic reasoning traces used in SFT for domains lacking such data (multi-turn conversations, multilinguality, everyday conversations); these synthetic completions form a portion of the 10 reasoning-mode SFT datasets.
Qwen3-32B generated the chosen completions for SmolLM3's reasoning-mode synthetic preference pairs used in APO.

Qwen3-32B generated the response/think traces for many SFT think splits in smoltalk2: smoltalk_multilingual8 (244736), smoltalk_everyday_convs_reasoning (2057), smoltalk_systemchats (27436), aya_dataset (15222), table_gpt (13201), LongAlign-64k-yarn-131k (7526), and Multi-Turn IF responses (28217). It is the dominant `_think` generator in the SFT mix.
Qwen3-32B generated the chosen completions (preferred responses) for the synthetic `tulu_3_8b_pref_mix_Qwen3_32B_Qwen3_0.6B_think` split of smoltalk2 Preference (216385 rows, weight 0.25).

Qwen3-32B (in reasoning mode) was prompted with prompts from existing non-reasoning datasets to generate synthetic reasoning-mode SFT data covering multi-turn conversations, multilinguality, and everyday conversations — gaps the team could not otherwise fill from public reasoning datasets.
Qwen3-32B generations served as the 'chosen' completions in synthetic preference pairs for reasoning-mode APO alignment of SmolLM3-3B; pairs complement the Tulu3 non-reasoning data.

Several SFT splits in smoltalk2 SFT config carry traces generated by Qwen3-32B (thinking mode): smoltalk_everyday_convs_reasoning_Qwen3_32B_think, smoltalk_systemchats_Qwen3_32B_think, LongAlign_64k_Qwen3_32B_yarn_131k_think, aya_dataset_Qwen3_32B_think, smoltalk_multilingual8_Qwen3_32B_think, table_gpt_Qwen3_32B_think.
tulu_3_8b_pref_mix_Qwen3_32B_Qwen3_0.6B_think split bundles preference pairs whose 'chosen' answers were generated by Qwen3-32B (thinking mode); used in SmolLM3-3B's DPO mixture.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT
edges.description: DeepSeek-R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for chat and safety prompts (Tulu 3 / WildChat / OpenAssistant subsets) and for additional non-math/non-code data sources (Aya, TableGPT) that populate Dolci-Think-SFT-7B used to train Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT.
description_variants: DeepSeek-R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for chat and safety prompts (Tulu 3 / WildChat / OpenAssistant subsets) and for additional non-math/non-code data sources (Aya, TableGPT) that populate Dolci-Think-SFT-7B used to train Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT.

DeepSeek-R1 produced new reasoning traces over the existing prompts repurposed from Tülu 3 / OLMo 2 (WildChat, oasst1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo identity) that populate Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.

DeepSeek-R1 generated new reasoning traces for the existing-prompt portions of the 7B Dolci-Think-SFT mix repurposed from Tulu 3/OLMo 2 (WildChat, oasst1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT).
DeepSeek-R1 generates reasoning traces and completions for the Chat & safety prompts (Tülu-3 WildChat/OpenAssistant subsets) and other non-math/code datasets in Think SFT 7B.
For chat & safety prompts, reasoning traces and completions in Dolci-Think-SFT-7B are generated by DeepSeek R1.
Reasoning-chain completions for the science/other (TableGPT, Aya, etc.) portions of Dolci-Think-SFT-7B are generated by DeepSeek R1.

DeepSeek R1 generated new <think>...</think> reasoning traces for the existing Tülu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts (WildChat, oasst1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo Identity Prompts) that compose part of the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B SFT mixture.

DeepSeek R1 generated new <think>...</think> reasoning traces over repurposed Tulu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo Identity); these traces are part of the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-7B SFT data trained on by allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT.
DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for the chat, safety, science, and 'other' (TableGPT, Aya) prompts in allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT's SFT mix.
DeepSeek R1 generates reasoning traces and completions for the chat, safety, TableGPT, and Aya components of Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (Section 4.2.1).

DeepSeek R1 generated new <think>…</think> reasoning traces for the existing Tulu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts (WildChat, OASST1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, OLMo Identity Prompts) used in Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.
DeepSeek-R1 generated new reasoning traces for the repurposed Tülu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts in Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (mixed with R1-0528 outputs).
DeepSeek R1 synthesizes reasoning traces for chat, safety and science prompts.

DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for the Chat (WildChat/OpenAssistant), Safety (CoCoNot/WildGuardMix/WildJailbreak), Science (OpenThoughts3 Science), and Aya/TableGPT subsets of Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.

DeepSeek R1 generated new reasoning traces for the existing prompts repurposed from Tülu 3 / OLMo 2 (WildChat, oasst1/Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, Table-GPT, Olmo Identity Prompts) that fed Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.

DeepSeek R1 (mixed with DeepSeek R1 0528) generated new reasoning traces over the Tülu-3/OLMo-2 prompt sources (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo Identity Prompts) used as Dolci-Think-SFT-7B SFT data.
DeepSeek-R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for Tulu-3 chat/safety, Aya and TableGPT prompts in Dolci Think SFT.
DeepSeek R1 generates reasoning traces and completions for the chat (WildChat, OpenAssistant), safety, and other prompt subsets used in Dolci Think SFT 7B.

DeepSeek R1 generated new reasoning traces for the existing-prompt subsets (WildChat, OASST Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, Table-GPT, Olmo Identity) repurposed from Tülu 3 / OLMo 2.
Chat & safety reasoning traces and completions, plus traces for science/other components in the Dolci Think SFT 7B mixture, were generated by DeepSeek R1.
DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for the chat & safety prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant, Tülu 3 safety, Aya, science) consumed by 7B Think SFT training.

DeepSeek R1 was used (alongside DeepSeek R1 0528) to generate the new <think> reasoning traces for the existing-prompt sub-sources of Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (WildChat, OASST, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, OLMo Identity Prompts).

DeepSeek-R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for the chat & safety subset of Dolci Think SFT (Tülu 3 WildChat/OpenAssistant + Tülu 3 safety prompts) and for non-OpenThoughts3 science/auxiliary data (TableGPT, Aya).

DeepSeek R1 (mixed with R1 0528) generated the new reasoning traces appended to existing prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo Identity Prompts) repurposed from Tulu 3 / OLMo 2 in the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture.

DeepSeek R1 (alongside DeepSeek R1 0528) produced the new reasoning traces attached to the existing-prompt subset of Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (WildChat, oasst1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT) repurposed from Tülu 3 / OLMo 2.
DeepSeek-R1 generated new reasoning traces for the existing Tulu-3 / OLMo-2 prompt sources (WildChat, OASST1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT) that flow into the 7B SFT mixture.

DeepSeek R1 (Guo et al., 2025) generates reasoning traces and completions for chat/safety (WildChat, OpenAssistant, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak), Aya, TableGPT, and OpenThoughts3 incomplete cases for Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.
DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for the chat & safety subset and other Dolci Think SFT data.
DeepSeek R1 generated new reasoning traces over Tülu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT) used in Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.

DeepSeek R1 (family root) generated the new reasoning traces for the 'existing prompts' subset (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT) repurposed from Tulu 3 / OLMo 2 in the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mix.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT
edges.description: DeepSeek-R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for chat and safety prompts (Tulu 3 / WildChat / OpenAssistant subsets) and for additional non-math/non-code data sources (Aya, TableGPT) that populate Dolci-Think-SFT-32B used to train Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT.
description_variants: DeepSeek-R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for chat and safety prompts (Tulu 3 / WildChat / OpenAssistant subsets) and for additional non-math/non-code data sources (Aya, TableGPT) that populate Dolci-Think-SFT-32B used to train Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT.

DeepSeek-R1 produced new reasoning traces over the existing prompts repurposed from Tülu 3 / OLMo 2 (WildChat, oasst1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo identity) that populate Dolci-Think-SFT-32B.

DeepSeek-R1 generated new reasoning traces for the existing-prompt portions of the 32B Dolci-Think-SFT mix repurposed from Tulu 3/OLMo 2 (WildChat, oasst1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT).
DeepSeek-R1 generates reasoning traces and completions for the Chat & safety prompts and other non-math/code datasets in Think SFT 32B.
Chat & safety reasoning traces in Dolci-Think-SFT-32B are generated by DeepSeek R1.
DeepSeek R1 generates reasoning-chain completions for the science/other portions of Dolci-Think-SFT-32B.

DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces (<think>...</think>) for the WildChat / OpenAssistant / CoCoNot / WildGuardMix / WildJailbreak / Aya / TableGPT prompt subsets in Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (mixed with R1 0528 outputs).

DeepSeek R1 generated new <think>...</think> reasoning traces over repurposed Tulu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo Identity); these traces are part of the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-32B SFT data trained on by allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT.
DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for the chat, safety, science, and 'other' (TableGPT, Aya) prompts in allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT's SFT mix.
DeepSeek-R1 (alongside DeepSeek-R1-0528) generated the new reasoning traces appended to the repurposed Tulu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts in Dolci-Think-SFT-32B.
DeepSeek R1 generates reasoning traces and completions for the chat, safety, TableGPT, and Aya portions of Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (Section 4.2.1).

DeepSeek-R1 generated new reasoning traces for the repurposed Tülu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts (WildChat, OASST Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo Identity) used in the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mix; mixed with R1-0528 outputs.
DeepSeek R1 synthesizes chat, safety and science reasoning traces.
DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces / completions for Chat/Safety/Science/Aya/TableGPT subsets used in 32B Think SFT.

DeepSeek R1 was one of two trace generators producing the new reasoning traces for the repurposed prompt slice (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, Table-GPT, Olmo Identity) in Dolci-Think-SFT-32B.

DeepSeek R1 generated new reasoning traces over the existing prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, Table-GPT, Olmo Identity Prompts) repurposed from Tulu 3 / OLMo 2 into the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture.
DeepSeek-R1 generated chat/safety/Aya/TableGPT reasoning traces in Dolci Think SFT 32B.
DeepSeek R1 generates the chat (WildChat, OpenAssistant), safety, and other reasoning-trace subsets used in Dolci Think SFT 32B.

DeepSeek R1 generated new reasoning traces for the existing-prompt subsets (WildChat, OASST Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, Table-GPT, Olmo Identity) repurposed from Tülu 3 / OLMo 2.
Chat/safety/science reasoning traces in the Dolci Think SFT 32B mixture were generated by DeepSeek R1.

DeepSeek-R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for the chat & safety subset of Dolci Think SFT (Tülu 3 WildChat/OpenAssistant + Tülu 3 safety prompts) and for non-OpenThoughts3 science/auxiliary data (TableGPT, Aya).

DeepSeek R1 (mixed with R1 0528) generated the new reasoning traces appended to existing prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, Olmo Identity Prompts) repurposed from Tulu 3 / OLMo 2 in the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture.

DeepSeek R1 (alongside DeepSeek R1 0528) produced the new reasoning traces attached to the existing-prompt subset of Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (WildChat, oasst1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT) repurposed from Tülu 3 / OLMo 2.
DeepSeek-R1 generated new reasoning traces for the existing Tulu-3 / OLMo-2 prompt sources (WildChat, OASST1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT) that flow into the 32B SFT mixture.
DeepSeek R1 (Guo et al., 2025) generates reasoning traces and completions for chat/safety/Aya/TableGPT and incomplete OpenThoughts3 examples in Dolci-Think-SFT-32B.
DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces and completions for chat & safety prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant, Tülu 3 safety, Aya, science) consumed by 32B Think SFT training.

DeepSeek R1 (alongside R1 0528) generated the new <think> reasoning traces for the existing-prompt sub-sources of the 32B Dolci-Think-SFT mixture (WildChat, OASST, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, OLMo Identity Prompts).
DeepSeek R1 generated reasoning traces and completions in the 32B Dolci Think SFT mix.
DeepSeek R1 generated new reasoning traces over Tülu 3 / OLMo 2 prompts (WildChat, OpenAssistant Guanaco, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT) used in Dolci-Think-SFT-32B.

DeepSeek R1 (family root) generated new reasoning traces for the 'existing prompts' subset (WildChat, oasst1, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT) repurposed in the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mix.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT
edges.description: OpenThoughts3 (Guha et al., 2025a) contributes the math, STEM, code, and science subsets that populate Dolci Think OpenThoughts 3+ Math/STEM/Code; incomplete OpenThoughts3 reasoning traces are regenerated by QwQ-32B (math/code) or DeepSeek-R1 (other) before inclusion in Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.
description_variants: OpenThoughts3 (Guha et al., 2025a) contributes the math, STEM, code, and science subsets that populate Dolci Think OpenThoughts 3+ Math/STEM/Code; incomplete OpenThoughts3 reasoning traces are regenerated by QwQ-32B (math/code) or DeepSeek-R1 (other) before inclusion in Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.
OpenThoughts 3 supplied 941,166 prompts (extended to 32K context length and with code prompts downsampled to a 16x multiple) as the largest existing-reasoning-trace component of Dolci-Think-SFT-7B.

OpenThoughts 3 contributes existing reasoning traces (Apache 2.0); for the 7B mix it was extended to 32K context and code prompts downsampled 16x, yielding 941,166 prompts (the team's 'Dolci OpenThoughts 3' redistribution).
OpenThoughts3 math (752,997), STEM (99,269) and code (88,900) prompts (with regenerated reasoning chains) are included as Math/Science/Coding prompt sources for Think SFT 7B.

OpenThoughts 3 (1.2M reasoning traces) was extended to 32K context and code prompts downsampled 16x, yielding 941,166 prompts ('Dolci OpenThoughts 3') used in the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture for Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT.

OpenThoughts 3 reasoning traces extended to 32K context, code prompts downsampled to 16X. Included as a leaf component of the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-7B SFT mixture used for allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT.
allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT's SFT mix uses OpenThoughts3 math/STEM/code subsets (752K + 99K + 88K prompts, upsampled).
Dolci Think OpenThoughts 3+ Math (752,997), STEM (99,269), Code (88,900), and Science subsets all derive from OpenThoughts3 (Guha et al., 2025a) per Table 17.

OpenThoughts3-1.2M (Apache 2.0) is incorporated into Dolci-Think-SFT-7B after being extended to 32K context length and downsampling code prompts to a 16x multiple, yielding 941,166 prompts (released as 'Dolci OpenThoughts 3').
Trained on the math subset of OpenThoughts3-1.2M (752,997 prompts; '+' indicates regenerated/filtered traces) used as Dolci Think OpenThoughts3+ Math.
Trained on the STEM subset of OpenThoughts3-1.2M (99,269 prompts) as Dolci Think OpenThoughts3+ STEM.
Trained on the code subset of OpenThoughts3-1.2M (88,900 prompts) as Dolci Think OpenThoughts3+ Code; downsampled to 16 repetitions and incomplete completions regenerated.

Dolci-Think-SFT-7B incorporates OpenThoughts3-1.2M (Apache 2.0), extended to 32K context length and downsampled code prompts to 16X multiple, totaling 941,166 prompts (Ai2's 'Dolci OpenThoughts 3' version).

OpenThoughts 3 (open-thoughts/OpenThoughts3-1.2M, Apache 2.0) supplied existing reasoning traces; Ai2 extended it to 32K context and downsampled code prompts to a 16x multiple, yielding 941,166 total prompts (released as the Dolci OpenThoughts 3 derivative).
Math, code, STEM, and science prompts (with regenerated reasoning traces) sourced from OpenThoughts3.
OpenThoughts 3 reasoning traces (941,166 prompts after extending to 32K context and downsampling code prompts to 16x) are repackaged as 'Dolci OpenThoughts 3' inside the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture.

OpenThoughts3-1.2M contributes 941,166 reasoning prompts, extended to 32K context length and with code prompts downsampled to 16X multiple; the Olmo-modified version is shipped as Dolci OpenThoughts 3.

Dolci Think SFT 7B includes 752,997 OpenThoughts3 math prompts plus 99,269 OpenThoughts3 STEM and 88,900 OpenThoughts3 code prompts (free-text Dolci Think OpenThoughts 3+ subsets), as well as the OpenThoughts3 science subset for the science slice.
OpenThoughts 3 (Apache 2.0) extended to 32K context length with code prompts downsampled to a 16x multiple, contributing 941,166 prompts (the team's redistribution is named 'Dolci OpenThoughts 3').
Math, STEM and Code leaves in Dolci Think SFT 7B: 752,997 OpenThoughts3+ Math, 99,269 OpenThoughts3+ STEM, and 88,900 OpenThoughts3+ Code prompts.

OpenThoughts 3 reasoning traces (Apache 2.0) extended to 32K context length with code prompts downsampled 16x, totaling 941,166 prompts, included in Dolci-Think-SFT-7B as a source of existing reasoning traces. The Ai2-modified version is referred to as 'Dolci OpenThoughts 3'.

OpenThoughts 3 (Apache 2.0) is included in the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture, extended to 32K context length and with code prompts downsampled to a 16x multiple, totaling 941,166 prompts (the in-house transformed version is named Dolci OpenThoughts 3).

Component dataset within Dolci-Think-SFT-7B: OpenThoughts 3 reasoning traces extended to 32K context length with code prompts downsampled to a 16x multiple, yielding 941,166 prompts that were then included in the SFT mixture.
OpenThoughts3 reasoning-trace corpus extended to 32K context length and downsampled with code prompts at a 16x multiple, contributing 941,166 prompts ('Dolci OpenThoughts 3') to the 7B SFT mix.
Math subset (Dolci Think OpenThoughts 3+ Math, 752,997 prompts) is sourced from the math subset of OpenThoughts3 (Guha et al., 2025a); for incomplete traces QwQ-32B regenerates the reasoning chain.
STEM subset of OpenThoughts3 (Dolci Think OpenThoughts 3+ STEM, 99,269 prompts; Table 17) — sourced from OpenThoughts3 science subset. Subset of OpenThoughts3-1.2M.
Code subset of OpenThoughts3 (Dolci Think OpenThoughts 3+ Code, 88,900 prompts; Table 17). Subset of OpenThoughts3-1.2M; combined with Dolci Think Python Algorithms.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT trained on OpenThoughts3-1.2M (Apache 2.0) extended to 32K context with code prompts downsampled 16x to 941,166 prompts — released as the Dolci OpenThoughts 3 variant.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think
edges.description: Olmo 3 Think 32B (final, 750-step OlmoRL) is initialized from Olmo 3 Think 32B DPO and trained on Dolci-Think-RL-32B.
description_variants: Olmo 3 Think 32B (final, 750-step OlmoRL) is initialized from Olmo 3 Think 32B DPO and trained on Dolci-Think-RL-32B.
Olmo-3-32B-Think is initialized from the Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO checkpoint and continues training with reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) on the Dolci Think RL mixture.
Olmo 3 Think 32B is RLVR-trained from the Think DPO 32B checkpoint (final RL run on top of the DPO checkpoint).
Olmo 3 32B Think (final 3.0) is initialized from Olmo 3 32B Think DPO and trained with OlmoRL for 750 steps. Initial training run; 32B uses the 7B-DPO-filtered prompt mix due to compute constraints.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final RLVR-trained checkpoint) is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO and continues with RLVR training on the Dolci-Think-RL-32B prompt mixture.
Olmo 3 32B Think (initial RL release) is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO; OlmoRL training proceeds for ~5 days on 224 GPUs with 8 H100 nodes for training and 20 nodes for inference.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (Final Models RLVR row) continues from the Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO checkpoint per the Model Family table - RLVR is the post-training stage immediately after DPO in the 32B-Think column.
Olmo-3-32B-Think initializes from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO and is finetuned via OlmoRL (Section 4.4.3, Table 24).
The final 32B Think 3.0 model is initialized from the Think-DPO 32B checkpoint and trained with OlmoRL.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final RLVR) continues from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO with an RLVR stage.
32B Think (RLVR 3.0) continues from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint via OlmoRL on Dolci-Think-RL-32B.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final RLVR model) is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO per the Olmo-3 family staging (Base → SFT → DPO → RLVR).
The final Olmo-3-32B-Think (RLVR) checkpoint continues training from the Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO checkpoint per the Model Family table layout (RLVR row follows DPO row in the same 32B Think column).
Final 32B Think model continues RL from the Think-DPO 32B checkpoint.
Olmo 3 32B Think (final Think 3.0 32B) is initialized from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final) initialized from the 32B Think SFT/DPO merge (32b-1e-4-5e-5); the public Olmo-3-32B-Think release follows this RL stage.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (post-RL) is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO and trained via OlmoRL on Dolci-Think-RL.
Olmo 3 32B Think continues RLVR training from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint.
allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think was initialized from the DPO checkpoint allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO; the paper shows DPO is a strictly better RL starting point than SFT (Table 22, Figure 19).

edges.description: Olmo 3.1 Think 32B is the extended-RL continuation of the same OlmoRL run for Olmo-3-32B-Think (initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO), trained for an additional ~21 days up to 2300 steps and yielding ~4+ point gains on AIME, ZebraLogic, IFEval and ~20 points on IFBench (Section 4.1.2 / Table 14).
description_variants: Olmo 3.1 Think 32B is the extended-RL continuation of the same OlmoRL run for Olmo-3-32B-Think (initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO), trained for an additional ~21 days up to 2300 steps and yielding ~4+ point gains on AIME, ZebraLogic, IFEval and ~20 points on IFBench (Section 4.1.2 / Table 14).

Olmo-3.1-32B-Think is a continuation of the SAME RL run that produced Olmo-3-32B-Think, which itself initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO; therefore Olmo-3.1-32B-Think also derives from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint.

Same global LM-judge (Qwen3-32B, thinking off) provides general-chat rewards for the Olmo 3.1 32B Think extended RL run.
Olmo-3.1-32B-Think uses the same OlmoRL recipe as Olmo-3-32B-Think, including Qwen3-32B (thinking mode off) as the LM judge for non-verifiable chat rewards.
Olmo 3.1 32B Think continues to use Qwen3-32B (thinking off) as the LM judge during extended RL training.
Qwen3-32B is the LM judge for the extended Olmo 3.1 32B Think RL run.
Qwen3-32B is the LLM judge for verifiable rewards in 32B Think RL.
Qwen3-32B (thinking off) continues to serve as the LM judge for non-verifiable rewards during the extended Olmo 3.1 Think 32B OlmoRL run.
Qwen3-32B (thinking off) acts as the chat-reward LM judge during the extended OlmoRL run that produces Olmo-3.1-32B-Think.
OlmoRL chat rewards for the extended 3.1 32B Think run were judged by Qwen3-32B in thinking-off mode.
Qwen3-32B (thinking off) acted as LM judge providing non-verifiable Chat-reference and Chat-open-ended reward scores during the extended OlmoRL training of Olmo-3.1-32B-Think.

For chat (open-ended and reference-based) verification during RL, the team uses an LM-judge by default: Qwen3-32B with thinking off, hosted on vLLM, with up to 32K input and 2K response tokens. Footnote 36 makes this the global default LM-judge across all OLMo-3 RLVR runs.
Same Qwen3 32B LM judge (thinking mode off) used during the extended RL run for chat-reference and chat-open-ended verifiers.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think
edges.description: Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over the 556,095-prompt candidate pool; per-prompt pass rates from these completions decided which prompts entered the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B mixture. Filter signal recorded as the released dataset allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO (HF; splits coding/general/if/math/puzzle).
description_variants: Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over the 556,095-prompt candidate pool; per-prompt pass rates from these completions decided which prompts entered the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B mixture. Filter signal recorded as the released dataset allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO (HF; splits coding/general/if/math/puzzle).

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated ~4.35M completions (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO) over the candidate prompt pool; per-prompt pass-rates from these rollouts decided inclusion via difficulty-based filtering when constructing the Dolci-Think-RL-7B prompt set used to RLVR-train Olmo-3-7B-Think.

Olmo 3 7B Think DPO checkpoint is used as an offline-difficulty filter for Dolci-Think-RL-7B prompts: 8 rollouts per prompt at temperature 1.0 / top-p 1.0; prompts with pass-rate > 62.5% are removed from the RL training pool.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO) over 556,095 prompts; this dataset is what Dolci-Think-RL-7B was constructed from, so the DPO model decided final inclusion of prompts in the RL training data Olmo-3-7B-Think trains on.

edges.description: On-policy preference completions for the 8B mixture were generated by sampling from the 8B Tülu 3 SFT model itself (one of 22 models in the response-generation pool).
description_variants: On-policy preference completions for the 8B mixture were generated by sampling from the 8B Tülu 3 SFT model itself (one of 22 models in the response-generation pool).
On-policy preference responses (one of two responses per prompt) were generated by the Tulu 3 8B SFT model itself, then judged against off-policy generations.

allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-SFT produced on-policy completions used in the chosen/rejected pairs of the 8B preference mixture for allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO (Stage 2 of the synthetic preference pipeline).
On-policy completions in the Tülu 3 8B preference mix are sampled from allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-SFT per the synthetic preference pipeline in Section 5.2.1 'Response Generation'.

On-policy completions used in this preference mix (the SFT-Reused-On-Policy and WildChat-Reused-On-Policy splits) were sampled from allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-SFT itself, then paired against off-policy completions from the model pool.
On-policy preference completions: one of the four candidates per prompt was sampled from Tülu 3 8B SFT (the SFT model that initializes this DPO run).
On-policy preference completions were generated by the Tulu 3 8B SFT model — paired against off-policy completions from external instruct models in the synthetic preference pipeline.

On-policy completions for allenai/llama-3.1-tulu-3-8b-preference-mixture were sampled from allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-SFT (the Tülu 3 8B SFT model) and paired against off-policy outputs to produce the chosen/rejected pairs for DPO.

Tülu 3 8B SFT generates the on-policy half of preference pairs (Stage 2 of §5.2.1): for the on-policy subset, one of the two responses is sampled from this SFT model and the other from an off-policy pool model.

The 8B Tülu 3 SFT checkpoint generated the on-policy slice (one response per pair) of the preference data used to train allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO; the other response comes from one of the off-policy pool models.

edges.subject: allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-70B-DPO
edges.description: On-policy preference completions for the 70B mixture were generated from the 70B Tülu 3 SFT model.
description_variants: On-policy preference completions for the 70B mixture were generated from the 70B Tülu 3 SFT model.
On-policy preference responses (one of two responses per prompt) were generated by the Tulu 3 70B SFT model itself, then judged against off-policy generations.

allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-70B-SFT produced on-policy completions used in the chosen/rejected pairs of the 70B preference mixture for allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-70B-DPO (Stage 2 of the synthetic preference pipeline).
On-policy completions in the Tülu 3 70B preference mix are sampled from allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-70B-SFT per the synthetic preference pipeline in Section 5.2.1 'Response Generation'.

On-policy completions used in this preference mix (the SFT-Reused-On-Policy and WildChat-Reused-On-Policy splits) were sampled from allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-70B-SFT itself, then paired against off-policy completions from the model pool.
On-policy preference completions: one of the four candidates per prompt was sampled from Tülu 3 70B SFT (the SFT model that initializes this DPO run).
On-policy preference completions were generated by the Tulu 3 70B SFT model — paired against off-policy completions from external instruct models in the synthetic preference pipeline.

On-policy completions for allenai/llama-3.1-tulu-3-70b-preference-mixture were sampled from allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-70B-SFT (the Tülu 3 70B SFT model) and paired against off-policy outputs to produce the chosen/rejected pairs for DPO.

Tülu 3 70B SFT generates the on-policy half of preference pairs (Stage 2 of §5.2.1): for the on-policy subset, one of the two responses is sampled from this SFT model and the other from an off-policy pool model.

The 70B Tülu 3 SFT checkpoint generated the on-policy slice (one response per pair) of the preference data used to train allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-70B-DPO; the other response comes from one of the off-policy pool models.

edges.subject: allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-SFT
edges.description: IF-Persona-SFT and IF-augmented constraint definitions are borrowed from IFEval's 25 verifiable constraint types (Zhou et al. 2023).
description_variants: IF-Persona-SFT and IF-augmented constraint definitions are borrowed from IFEval's 25 verifiable constraint types (Zhou et al. 2023).
If-Persona-Sft (29,980 instances in the Tulu 3 SFT mix consumed by Tulu 3 8B SFT) was generated to cover the 25 IFEval constraint types.
The verifiable-constraint taxonomy used to define each prompt's required constraints in the persona-IF SFT subset is borrowed from the IFEval dataset.
The verifiable-constraint taxonomy used in personas-instruction-following (consumed by Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-SFT) was borrowed from the IFEval dataset's constraint taxonomy.

The 25 verifiable-constraint types used as seeds for Tülu 3 Persona IF generation are drawn from the IFEval benchmark (Zhou et al. 2023); subject is Tülu 3 8B SFT, the consumer of the resulting SFT data.
The Persona IF split's verifiable constraints are borrowed from the IFEval constraint taxonomy (Zhou et al. 2023), shaping the instruction-following data used to train this model.

The verifiable-constraint taxonomy used to construct allenai/tulu-3-sft-personas-instruction-following (1-3 constraints per prompt) is borrowed from IFEval; 8B Tülu 3 SFT trained on this data and therefore inherits IFEval's constraint taxonomy as a methodology dependency without IFEval data entering training.
Tülu 3 Persona-IF SFT data uses the 25 verifiable-constraint types defined in IFEval (Zhou et al. 2023) as the seed taxonomy.
The verifiable-constraint taxonomy used for the persona-instruction-following SFT subset (29,980 examples) is borrowed from the IFEval benchmark dataset; consumed by Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-SFT.

edges.subject: allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-SFT
edges.description: Decontamination filter: IFEval evaluation prompts were used to remove overlapping training instances from the SFT mix (8-gram match, prompts only).

anchor_list.excerpt: We consider a training set to be contaminated if any number of its instances overlap with more than 2% of the instances in any of the evaluations in our development and unseen suites. We remove all the training sets that were contaminated
anchor_list.explanation: Section 3.2 documents the cross-evaluation decontamination scheme — IFEval (and other dev/unseen evals) effectively functioned as a contamination filter on the SFT mix.

edges.subject: allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO
edges.description: Prompts in the allenai/tulu-3-IF-augmented-on-policy-8b sub-corpus — a constituent of the allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO DPO mixture — are augmented with verifiable constraints sourced from google/IFEval.
description_variants: Prompts in the allenai/tulu-3-IF-augmented-on-policy-8b sub-corpus — a constituent of the allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO DPO mixture — are augmented with verifiable constraints sourced from google/IFEval.

Prompts in this IF-augmented preference split are augmented with verifiable instruction-following constraints drawn from google/IFEval; the constraints become part of the prompt that allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO trains on.

Constraints layered onto Llama 3.1 Tulu 3 IF-Augmented (on-policy 8B)'s prompts were drawn from google/IFEval's verifiable-instruction templates; allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO therefore consumed IFEval-derived constraint text during DPO training.

allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO indirectly trained on prompts from google/IFEval via the allenai/tulu-3-IF-augmented-on-policy-8b preference dataset (prompt source for this preference subset). Constraints from IFEval used to augment prompts.

The Tulu-3-DPO 8B IF-RLVR run also trains on prompts using IFEval's 25 verifiable constraints (with extended variable ranges) as in-domain training constraints, in addition to the IFTrain constraints.

anchor_list.explanation: Source states constraints applied to the prompts come from google/IFEval.
Source explicitly cites google/IFEval as the origin of the verifiable instruction constraints injected into the prompts.
Card explicitly identifies google/IFEval as the source of instruction-following constraints layered onto prompts in this dataset.
Card states the preference dataset's prompts originate from google/IFEval.

anchor_list.excerpt: As training constraints we use IFTrain and the constraints from IFEval, which we expand by increasing the variable range for each constraint.
anchor_list.explanation: Explicit statement that IFEval constraints are mixed into IF-RLVR training data.

edges.subject: allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B
edges.description: Upstream constraint source for the IF subset of the RLVR mixture: verifiable constraints from IFEval were randomly added to sampled Tulu 2 SFT prompts to form the IF Prompts subset used in Tulu-3-8B RL training.
description_variants: Upstream constraint source for the IF subset of the RLVR mixture: verifiable constraints from IFEval were randomly added to sampled Tulu 2 SFT prompts to form the IF Prompts subset used in Tulu-3-8B RL training.

edges.subject: nvidia/llama-3_1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1
edges.description: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1 was post-trained on the v1.1 Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset (SFT splits: code, math, science, chat, safety; RL split: instruction_following; ~30M+ samples covering 22M math / 10M code / 709k science / 56k IF / 40k chat / 31k safety).
description_variants: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1 was post-trained on the v1.1 Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset (SFT splits: code, math, science, chat, safety; RL split: instruction_following; ~30M+ samples covering 22M math / 10M code / 709k science / 56k IF / 40k chat / 31k safety).

Ultra-253B (nvidia/Llama-3_1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1) was post-trained on the Llama-Nemotron Post-Training Dataset v1.1 — a release containing SFT data (math, code, science, chat, safety) and RL data (instruction following) totaling roughly 33M samples — released by NVIDIA in support of this model.
Aggregator-level edge: v1's multi-stage post-training (SFT + GRPO RL) drew on the Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset, which NVIDIA released alongside the model to promote openness.

LN-Ultra is post-trained on the open-released nvidia/Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset (~30M samples spanning math, code, science, chat, instruction-following, safety) — the curated SFT/RL aggregator covering reasoning-on and reasoning-off data.
Ultra-253B-v1 was post-trained on data from the publicly released Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset (linked in the card under Training Datasets) covering math/code/reasoning/instruction-following.
Llama-Nemotron Ultra (Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1) was SFT+RL-trained on Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset.

anchor_list.excerpt: We are releasing an additional 2.2M Math and 500K Code Reasoning Data in support of our release of [Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1]... This dataset is a compilation of SFT and RL data that supports improvements of math, code, general reasoning, and instruction following capabilities

edges.subject: nvidia/llama-3_1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1
edges.description: DeepSeek-R1 synthetically generated 3,934,627 responses (the dominant reasoning-on chain-of-thought source) in the post-training dataset Ultra-253B-v1 was trained on.
description_variants: DeepSeek-R1 synthetically generated 3,934,627 responses (the dominant reasoning-on chain-of-thought source) in the post-training dataset Ultra-253B-v1 was trained on.

Synthetic responses generated by DeepSeek-R1 (3,934,627 samples — reasoning traces) are part of the Llama-Nemotron Post-Training Dataset that Ultra-253B was trained on. The dataset documents this generator under 'Models that were used in the creation of this dataset', with some prompts containing responses for both reasoning-on and reasoning-off modes to teach the model to distinguish between the two.
DeepSeek-R1 generates 16 'reasoning' solutions per AoPS problem for the math SFT data LN-Ultra consumes (reasoning-on traces).

DeepSeek-R1 generates the Python (and selected C++) solutions for LN-Ultra's code-reasoning SFT data via Nucleus Sampling (temperature 0.6, top-p 0.95) with reasoning enclosed in <think> tags; ~488K Python samples were retained.
DeepSeek-R1 generates multiple reasoning traces for every science question in LN-Ultra's SFT slice; for questions without ground-truth answers, majority voting infers the most likely correct answer.

DeepSeek-R1 generates multiple candidate responses per general-domain prompt (open QA / closed QA / extraction / brainstorming) for LN-Ultra's reasoning-on general SFT slice; rejection sampling against a reward model retains the highest-quality.
DeepSeek-R1 generates reasoning-on chain-of-thought solutions (16 generations per problem) for the math SFT data that nvidia/Llama-3_1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1 trains on.

DeepSeek-R1 generates multiple Python (and select C++) reasoning solutions per programming question for the code SFT corpus that nvidia/Llama-3_1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1 trains on; nucleus sampling at temperature 0.6, top-p 0.95.

DeepSeek-R1 generates multiple reasoning-trace solutions for every science question; majority-voted across solutions when ground truth is missing, before entering nvidia/Llama-3_1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1's SFT corpus.

DeepSeek-R1 generates multiple reasoning-on responses for the general-domain prompts that enter nvidia/Llama-3_1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1's SFT corpus; rejection-sampled by Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Reward.

anchor_list.explanation: Names DeepSeek-R1 as a 3.9M-sample response generator in the dataset.
Source's generators table lists deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1 as a model whose synthetic outputs entered the dataset that Ultra-253B trained on.
anchor_list.position: Section 'Responses', table 'Models that were used in the creation of this dataset' (lines 68-80)

anchor_list.excerpt: We prompt DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) and Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct ... We use 16 generations per problem for DeepSeek-R1
anchor_list.explanation: Paper specifies DeepSeek-R1 as the generator of 16 reasoning solutions per problem.

anchor_list.excerpt: We employ DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) to generate multiple solutions per question, primarily in Python, with C++ solutions also generated for specific benchmark testing
anchor_list.explanation: Paper names DeepSeek-R1 as the code-solution generator.

anchor_list.excerpt: For all questions in the dataset, we use DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) to generate multiple reasoning traces.
anchor_list.explanation: Paper names DeepSeek-R1 as the science reasoning-trace generator.

anchor_list.excerpt: For responses, we prompt DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) for multiple generations and perform rejection sampling using the Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B reward model (NVIDIA, 2024b).
anchor_list.explanation: Paper names DeepSeek-R1 as generator for general-domain reasoning-on responses.

anchor_list.excerpt: We prompt DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) and Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct (Qwen, 2024) to solve each problem multiple times producing 'reasoning' and 'non-reasoning' solutions respectively. We use 16 generations per problem for DeepSeek-R1
anchor_list.explanation: Documents DeepSeek-R1 as the reasoning-trace generator.

anchor_list.excerpt: We employ DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) to generate multiple solutions per question, primarily in Python, with C++ solutions also generated
anchor_list.explanation: DeepSeek-R1 is the code-reasoning solution generator.

anchor_list.excerpt: For all questions in the dataset, we use DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) to generate multiple reasoning traces.
anchor_list.explanation: DeepSeek-R1 generates the reasoning-on solutions for science.

anchor_list.excerpt: For responses, we prompt DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) for multiple generations and perform rejection sampling using the Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B reward model
anchor_list.explanation: DeepSeek-R1 is the general-domain reasoning generator.

edges.subject: allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO
edges.description: The pref-IF preference dataset is constructed by rewriting prompts from allenai/tulu-3-sft-personas-instruction-following to relax one constraint per prompt, so the dataset's design is directly derived from the SFT version's constraint-grounded prompts.
description_variants: The pref-IF preference dataset is constructed by rewriting prompts from allenai/tulu-3-sft-personas-instruction-following to relax one constraint per prompt, so the dataset's design is directly derived from the SFT version's constraint-grounded prompts.

The preference dataset allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO consumed was constructed by reworking prompts from the SFT-stage allenai/tulu-3-sft-personas-instruction-following dataset; methodology borrowed from that SFT recipe (rewrite to relax one constraint to produce a rejected response).

The preference dataset allenai/tulu-3-pref-personas-instruction-following that allenai/Llama-3.1-Tulu-3-8B-DPO trained on was constructed by taking a subset of the SFT-stage dataset allenai/tulu-3-sft-personas-instruction-following and rewriting prompts to relax one of the given constraints; the response to the modified prompt is treated as the rejected completion. This reuses the persona-IF data recipe at the DPO stage.

anchor_list.excerpt: we took a subset of its supervised-tuning version [here](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/tulu-3-sft-personas-instruction-following) and convert it into preference dataset. Specifically, we rewrote each prompt in the subset to relax one of the given constraints
anchor_list.explanation: Card explicitly states pref-IF was constructed by rewriting prompts from the SFT-personas-IF dataset, indicating methodological derivation.

anchor_list.excerpt: we took a subset of its supervised-tuning version (allenai/tulu-3-sft-personas-instruction-following) and convert it into preference dataset

edges.description: Llama-Nemotron post-training dataset contributes science prompts and tool-calling data to SFT for 14B-Thinking.
description_variants: Llama-Nemotron post-training dataset contributes science prompts and tool-calling data to SFT for 14B-Thinking.

Through the Nemotron-Cascade-RL-Instruction-Following dataset, Nemotron-Cascade-14B-Thinking trains on prompts drawn from a filtered and pre-processed RL split of nvidia/Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset.

Stage-1/Stage-2 science SFT prompts include problems from the post-training datasets in Llama-Nemotron (Bercovich et al., 2025; Nathawani et al., 2025). Subject nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-14B-Thinking trained on the resulting science SFT data.

Stage-2 tool-calling SFT data is the tool-calling subset of the Llama-Nemotron post-training dataset (Nathawani et al., 2025); subject nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-14B-Thinking sees 310K conversations / 1.41M turns (responses generated by Qwen3-235B-A22B). Note: this is a distinct role from the science prompt source.

IF-RL prompts come from the Llama-Nemotron instruction-following dataset (NVIDIA, 2025); originally 56K samples reduced to 40K after preprocessing. Subject nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-14B-Thinking trained on this IF-RL data via Nemotron-Cascade-RL-Instruction-Following.

description_variants: Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over 636,095 candidate prompts (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT); rollout pass-rates were used to filter easy prompts from the shared candidate pool from which Dolci-Think-RL-32B (the RLVR training mixture for Olmo-3-32B-Think) was drawn.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated completions over the candidate prompt pool considered when making Dolci-Think-RL (both 7B and 32B variants); pass-rates were used to filter 'easy' prompts during construction of Dolci-Think-RL-32B.

anchor_list.excerpt: completions from the Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT model over the prompts considered when making Dolci-Think-RL... mainly used to filter easy data
anchor_list.explanation: Completions-SFT filtered prompts from the Dolci-Think-RL candidate pool, which feeds both 7B and 32B Think RL stages.

anchor_list.excerpt: Dolci-Think-Completions-SFT is a set of 5,031,398 completions(!!) from the Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT model over the prompts considered when making Dolci-Think-RL. These completions were mainly used to filter easy data
anchor_list.explanation: States the SFT model generated completions used to filter 'easy' prompts when constructing Dolci-Think-RL (the 32B variant shares this prompt pool).

edges.subject: nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-8B
edges.description: Through the Nemotron-Cascade-RL-Instruction-Following dataset, Nemotron-Cascade-8B trains on prompts drawn from a filtered and pre-processed RL split of nvidia/Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset.
description_variants: Through the Nemotron-Cascade-RL-Instruction-Following dataset, Nemotron-Cascade-8B trains on prompts drawn from a filtered and pre-processed RL split of nvidia/Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset.

Stage-1/Stage-2 science SFT prompts include problems from the post-training datasets in Llama-Nemotron (Bercovich et al., 2025; Nathawani et al., 2025). Subject nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-8B trained on the resulting science SFT data.

Stage-2 tool-calling SFT data is the tool-calling subset of the Llama-Nemotron post-training dataset (Nathawani et al., 2025); subject nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-8B sees 310K conversations / 1.41M turns (responses generated by Qwen3-235B-A22B). Note: this is a distinct role from the science prompt source.

IF-RL prompts come from the Llama-Nemotron instruction-following dataset (NVIDIA, 2025); originally 56K samples reduced to 40K after preprocessing. Subject nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-8B trained on this IF-RL data via Nemotron-Cascade-RL-Instruction-Following.

anchor_list.explanation: Names the parent Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset (RL split) as a source for the IF-RL training prompts.

edges.subject: nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-8B
edges.description: nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-8B trained on prompts from HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk as part of the Stage-2 SFT general domain (269,974 questions / 799,521 samples). The HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk prompts were paired with thinking responses from DeepSeek-R1-0528 and/or non-thinking responses from DeepSeek-V3 / DeepSeek-V3-0324 in the Stage-2 blend.

anchor_list.excerpt: The general domain incorporates questions from mmlu auxiliary train, ShareGPT, SlimOrca, Magpie-Pro-300K-Filtered-H4, UltraInteract, GPTeacher, Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset-v1, allenai/qasc, and FLAN V2.
anchor_list.explanation: Source enumerates HuggingFaceTB/smoltalk as a prompt-providing component of the Stage-2 general domain that contributed to the SFT data the consumer trained on.
anchor_list.position: Header paragraph naming general-domain sources + Data Statistics > General table

edges.subject: nvidia/Nemotron-Cascade-8B
edges.description: DeepSeek-R1 is used as a verifier with up to eight attempts per problem to retain only problems with majority-voted correct answers in NuminaMath; ambiguous or noisy items are discarded before Math RL training.

anchor_list.excerpt: Because NuminaMath contains OCR and parsing errors, each problem is verified by the DeepSeek-R1 model with up to eight attempts. A rule-based verifier retains only problems with majority-voted correct answers
anchor_list.explanation: Documents DeepSeek-R1 as the prompt-quality filter.

edges.subject: nvidia/llama-3_1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1
edges.description: LN-Super is used as a difficulty estimator for LN-Ultra's reasoning RL prompts: it generates 8 responses per question, the empirical pass-rate is computed, and prompts with pass-rate >=0.75 are discarded so LN-Ultra trains on the genuinely hard examples.
description_variants: LN-Super pre-generates 8 responses per training question to compute pass rates; questions with pass-rate >=0.75 are intentionally discarded so LN-Ultra trains only on adequately challenging prompts.

anchor_list.excerpt: we preprocess the data by independently generating 8 responses per question using LN-Super, calculating the pass rate, and then intentionally discarding prompts with a pass rate of 0.75 or higher
anchor_list.explanation: Paper documents LN-Super as the prompt-difficulty filter for LN-Ultra reasoning RL.

anchor_list.excerpt: we preprocess the data by independently generating 8 responses per question using LN-Super, calculating the pass rate, and then intentionally discarding prompts with a pass rate of 0.75 or higher
anchor_list.explanation: LN-Super decides which prompts enter the RL training set via difficulty filtering.
